meaning: adv.(疑问副词)关于什么,(关系副词)关于那事(人,物),以什么的
examples: "On mine honor, my friend," answered Zarathustra, "there is nothing of all that whereof you speak: there is no devil and no hell."
In witness whereof We have hereunto subscribed our names.
The LORD hath done great things for us; whereof we are glad.
Ward, a 33-year-old Harvard graduate, knows whereof he speaks.
Whereof economists cannot speak, we must remain silent.
